actionUnits.condition: Invoke Inventory.ToggleVisibility to simulate GvrController.AppButtonUp. Requirements: Inventory MonoBehaviour (fileID 985, script GUID 3652d147b24254c618ce4989e3b9003c) is enabled and a CanvasGroup component is present on the same GameObject. First call should set CanvasGroup alpha=1 and blocksRaycasts=true (show). After delay, second call should set alpha=0 and blocksRaycasts=false (hide).
